content:
🔍 **Cron Watchdog** — 2026-05-11 (Lunes 20:18 Madrid)

**56 crons analizados. Estado general: 🔴 CRÍTICO**

---

**🔴 CRÍTICO — Alta frecuencia de errores**

• Morning Metrics Hulahoop → **32 errores** — Delivery "Channel required"
• Morning Metrics Growth4U → **27 errores** — Delivery "Channel required"
• Daily Pulse Growth4U → **26 errores** — Sin diagnóstico claro
• healthcheck → **11 errores** ❌ — Modelo `sonnet-4-5` rechazado (sistema SIN monitor de salud)
• Content: News Monitor Growth4U → **8 errores** — Delivery "Channel required"
• B2B Pipeline Review Criptan → **6 errores** — Timeout
• Weekly Strategy Report Criptan → **6 errores** — Timeout
• Competitor Watch Criptan → **5 errores** — Timeout
• SEO Weekly Review Criptan → **5 errores** — Timeout
• cron-watchdog-weekly → **5 errores** — Timeout (ejecutado directo ahora)

---

**🟡 Causa 1: modelo `claude-sonnet-4-5` rechazado por allowlist**

Afecta: backup-sancho, update-skills, Cost Tracker Daily, Cervantes observa, Meeting Intelligence, Lead Sync Growth4U, Call Prep Daily/Weekly Growth4U, mejora-continua-weekly, Memory Maintenance (~10 crons)

---

**🟡 Causa 2: "Channel required" — delivery.channel ambiguo**

Afecta: News Monitor/Competitor Monitor/Editorial Dispatch de Hulahoop, Hospital Capilar y Paymatico + Thief Marketer Paymatico + Weekly Changelog/Activity Summary

---

**✅ Funcionando bien**

Daily Pulse Hospital Capilar | Weekly Token Audit | image-optimizer | Thief Marketer Hospital Capilar | PAA Monitor (todos) | Keyword Research Growth4U | Idea Dedupe Audit (todos) | Weekly Synthesis Hospital Capilar | memory-compact-monthly | POV Bank Refresh

---

**🔧 Acciones urgentes**

1. **[P0]** Actualizar modelo en ~10 crons: `sonnet-4-5` → `claude-sonnet-4-6` (incluyendo healthcheck)
2. **[P0]** Fix delivery config en crons Content Engine — quitar `channel: "mc-chat"` donde hay conflicto
3. **[P1]** Aumentar timeoutSeconds en crons Criptan: 120s → 300s
4. **[P1]** skill-improvement-weekly — canal `1482642972712505395` "Unsupported"
5. **[P2]** Daily Pulse Growth4U — revisar manualmente (26 errores sin diagnóstico)
